title: Bhishma's Terrible Vow
summary: A son's renunciation secures one marriage and makes the Kuru succession depend on increasingly fragile heirs.

title: Kunti's Firstborn
summary: Karna's birth is concealed until the war has made recognition useless.

title: No Equal to Arjuna
summary: Drona's promise shapes both Arjuna's supremacy and the price demanded from Ekalavya.

title: The Thumb as Tuition
summary: A forest archer pays for a teacher who never taught him, preserving another pupil's promised place.

title: Karna Gives Away Protection
summary: Generosity, deception, and offended teachers converge when Karna most needs armor, memory, and solid earth.

title: Vows Made in the Hall
summary: Humiliation becomes a list of deaths that the war later fulfills one by one.

title: The Vow Before Sunset
summary: Abhimanyu's encirclement creates Arjuna's impossible deadline against Jayadratha.

title: Gandhari's Curse
summary: The mother of a hundred dead sons gives Krishna's own house the destruction he permitted hers.

title: A Crown for Loyalty
summary: Duryodhana answers Karna's humiliation with a kingdom, purchasing the allegiance Karna will not abandon even for birthright.
